# Public Safe Boundary

Public demos are browser-local demonstrations. They do not ask for user data and do not grant authority.

## Prohibited in public demos

- Wallet connection, token approval, network switching, transaction broadcast, or funds movement.
- Analytics, cookies, tracking pixels, submitted forms, or storage of user data.
- External network dependency for a demo run.
- Production authority or factual certification.

Expert-only pages may discuss human-signed operations conceptually, but they must remain separated and clearly labeled.
